programme.desc: France. When childhood friends Magalie and Blandine cross paths after many years, they decide to finally take their dream vacation to Greece. (Subtitles)

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog 3
programme.desc: Sonic, Knuckles, and Tails face Shadow, a powerful new foe. Outmatched, they form an unexpected alliance to stop him and protect the planet.

programme.title: The Lost City
programme.desc: Loretta Sage's novels are filled with ancient tombs and daring adventures, but that doesn't mean she's prepared for them in real life. When she is kidnapped by an eccentric billionaire to locate a legendary lost city, Loretta's handsome cover model, Alan, sets off on a heroic but hapless rescue mission. Thrust into an epic thrill-ride through the jungle, the unlikely pair must work together to survive the elements, and survive each other, to find the city's fabled treasure before it's lost forever.

programme.title: Drop
programme.desc: A widowed mother's first date in years turns terrifying when she receives anonymous threats during dinner, making her question if her charming date is behind the harassment.

programme.title: Caddo Lake
programme.desc: When an eight-year-old girl mysteriously vanishes, a series of past deaths and disappearances start to link together, forever altering a broken family's history.

programme.title: Speak No Evil
programme.desc: A dream holiday turns into a living nightmare when an American couple and their daughter spend the weekend at a British family's idyllic country estate.

programme.title: Nosferatu
programme.desc: A young land clerk is summoned to a vampire's castle, while his wife falls under the spell of a dark force in her dreams, leading to a perilous journey into the unknown.

programme.title: Caddo Lake
programme.desc: When an eight-year-old girl mysteriously vanishes, a series of past deaths and disappearances start to link together, forever altering a broken family's history.

programme.title: Flight 149: Hostage of War
programme.desc: In 1990, Iraq takes the world by surprise and invades Kuwait. BA Flight 149 from London lands in Kuwait for a scheduled stop with men, women and children aboard. The plane never reaches its final destination.

programme.title: The Dive
programme.desc: Two sisters go diving at a remote location. One of the sisters is struck, leaving her trapped 28 meters below. With low levels of oxygen and it is up to her sister to save her life.

programme.title: Rewriting Trump
programme.desc: Filmed over a year, exploring the story of Trump's return to power through the lens of biographer and New York Times best-selling author, Michael Wolff.

programme.title: Man With No Past
programme.desc: A man wakes up in a strange city with no memory. His search for answers leads to a clash with a powerful enemy, uncovering the truth about his identity.

programme.title: Rumours
programme.desc: Leaders of the wealthiest democracies face absurd challenges as night falls in misty woods, realising they are suddenly alone and struggling with their incompetence.

programme.title: Caddo Lake
programme.desc: When an eight-year-old girl mysteriously vanishes, a series of past deaths and disappearances start to link together, forever altering a broken family's history.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: Mad About the Boy
programme.desc: After jumping back into the dating pool, single mother Bridget Jones finds herself caught between a younger man and her son's science teacher.

programme.title: The Phoenician Scheme
programme.desc: Wealthy tycoon Zsa-zsa Korda names his nun daughter sole heir. As he starts a new venture, they face threats from scheming rivals, terrorists, and assassins.

programme.title: Dangerous Animals
programme.desc: When Zephyr, a free-spirited surfer, is abducted by a shark-obsessed serial killer and held captive on his boat, she must figure out how to escape before he carries out a ritualistic feeding to the sharks below.

programme.title: The Three Musketeers: D'artagnan
programme.desc: France. D'Artagnan arrives in Paris trying to find his attackers after being left for dead, which leads him to a real war where the future of France is at stake. (Subtitles)

programme.title: Wolf Man
programme.desc: Blake and his family barricade themselves in a farmhouse after an unseen creature attacks. As the night unfolds, Blake transforms into a dangerous being, threatening his wife and daughter.

programme.title: The Making of Gladiator II
programme.desc: A special look at the making of Gladiator II, featuring unprecedented access encompassing all aspects of production, from the grand scope of the set to characters, combat, costumes, scoring and more.

programme.title: Spin the Bottle
programme.desc: A group of friends plays spin the bottle in a house marked by a massacre, unleashing an evil spirit. As they die in terrifying ways, the survivors must uncover the house's dark secrets.

programme.title: Reagan
programme.desc: From the glitter of Hollywood to the world stage, Ronald Reagan overcomes the odds to become the 40th president of the United States.

programme.title: Freediver
programme.desc: Alexey Molchanov's daring attempt to set multiple freediving world records in 2023, paying tribute to his late mother while confronting adversity and testing the boundaries of human endurance in this extreme sport.

programme.title: Novocaine No Pain
programme.desc: When the girl of his dreams gets kidnapped, a man turns his inability to feel pain into an unexpected advantage as he fights a bunch of thugs to get her back.

programme.title: The Last Gunfight
programme.desc: Top assassins battle in a brutal underground tournament, but a rogue crew aims to survive, outsmart the killers, and bring down the mastermind behind it all.

programme.title: The Perfect Storm
programme.desc: It's Halloween, 1991. Near Gloucester, Massachusetts, the six members of the Andrea Gail, a swordfishing boat, head out to sea for their last trip of the season. Unbeknownst to them, a shockingly brutal storm is slowly gaining steam. Before the National Weather Bureau has a chance to inform the crew of the impending danger, it's too late. The resulting battle with three merging weather fronts, an unheralded natural disaster, is gruelling and tragic. Based on the true-life bestselling novel by Sebastian Junger.

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark
programme.desc: The year is 1936, Indiana Jones hears from a museum curator named Marcus Brody about a biblical artefact called The Ark of the Covenant, which can hold the key to humanly existence. Joined with Marion Ravenwood and Sallah, Jones ventures to vast places such as Nepal and Egypt to find this artefact. He will have to fight his enemy Belloq and a band of Nazis for the Lost Ark.

programme.title: Once Upon A Time... In Hollywood
programme.desc: The highly anticipated 9th film from Quentin Tarantino. In 1969 Los Angeles, during the Charles Manson murders, a TV actor and his stunt double, embark on an odyssey to make a name for themselves in the film industry.

programme.title: Cliffhanger
programme.desc: Gabe Walker is a member of the mountain-climbing rescue team. While crossing a ledge 1220m above the Earth, Gabe's friend's equipment fails and she slips out of his hand, falling to her death. Almost a year after, he must return to those dreaded peaks, where he finds himself trapped in a desperate battle against ruthless criminals, unforgiving nature and himself.

programme.title: Jaws
programme.desc: The thriller that scared movie fans everywhere out of the water. Three men undertake a perilous journey to hunt down a great white killer shark.

programme.title: A Quiet Place: Day One
programme.desc: A young woman named Sam finds herself trapped in New York City during the early stages of an invasion by alien creatures with ultra-sensitive hearing.

programme.title: Pacific Rim: Uprising
programme.desc: The globe-spanning conflict between otherworldly monsters of mass destruction and the human-piloted supermachines built to vanquish them was only a prelude to the all-out assault on humanity in "Pacific Rim Uprising." Jake Pentecost, is a once-promising Jaeger pilot whose legendary father gave his life to secure humanity's victory against the monstrous "Kaiju." Jake has since abandoned his training only to become caught up in a criminal underworld. But when an even more unstoppable threat is unleashed to tear through our cities and bring the world to its knees, he is given one last chance to live up to his father's legacy by his estranged sister, Mako Mori who is leading a brave new generation of pilots that have grown up in the shadow of war. As they seek justice for the fallen, their only hope is to unite together in a global uprising against the forces of extinction.

programme.title: Pitch Perfect
programme.desc: Beca is that girl who'd rather listen to what's coming out of her headphones than what's coming out of you. Arriving at her new college, she finds herself not right for any clique but somehow is muscled into one that she never would have picked on her own: alongside mean girls, sweet girls and weird girls whose only thing in common is how good they sound when they sing together, in the out-loud comedy Pitch Perfect. When Beca takes this acoustic singing group out of their world of traditional arrangements and perfect harmonies into all-new mash-ups, they fight to climb their way to the top of the cutthroat world of college a cappella. This could wind up either the coolest thing they'll ever do or the most insane, and it will probably be a little of both.

programme.title: Zoolander
programme.desc: Clear the runway for Derek Zoolander, VH1's three-time male model of the year but his face falls when hippie-chic 'he's so hot right now' Hansel scooters in to steal this year's award. The evil fashion guru Mugatu seizes the opportunity to turn Derek into a killing machine. It's a well-designed conspiracy and only with the help of Hansel and a few well-chosen accessories can Derek make the world safe.

programme.title: Knives Out
programme.desc: Detective Benoit Blanc is enlisted to investigate the untimely death of a renowned crime novelist. Blanc must sift through a web of red herrings and lies to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Bumblebee
programme.desc: Cybertron has fallen. When Optimus Prime sends Bumblebee to protect Earth, he begins his journey to become the hero the Universe needs. Crash landing, with no memory of his past, Bumblebee takes refuge in a junkyard disguised as a VW Beetle. Charlie (Hailee Steinfeld), a teenager trying to find her place in the world, discovers and repairs the battle-scarred robot. When the Decepticons forge an alliance with a secret agency led by Agent Burns (John Cena) to hunt down the remaining Autobots, Bumblebee and Charlie team up to protect the world in an action-packed adventure filled with humour and heart that's fun for the whole family.

programme.title: The Mummy: Tomb of the Dragon Emperor
programme.desc: The O'Connells must stop a mummy awoken from a 2000-year-old curse who threatens to plunge the world into his merciless, unending service. Doomed by a wronged sorceress, Zi Yuan, to spend eternity in suspended animation, the ruthless Dragon Emperor and his 10,000 warriors have laid forgotten for eons, entombed in clay as a vast, silent Terracotta Army.

programme.title: Jack Reacher: Never Go Back
programme.desc: When an Army Major is framed for treason, Reacher discovers she's the target of a massive government conspiracy and risks everything to take down the corrupt organisation.

programme.title: Troy
programme.desc: It is the year 1250 BC, during the late Bronze Age. Two emerging nations begin to clash after Paris, the Trojan prince, convinces Helen, Queen of Sparta, to leave her husband Menelaus, and sail with him back to Troy. After Menelaus finds out that his wife was taken by the Trojans, he asks his brother Agamemnon to help him get her back. Agamemnon sees this as an opportunity for power. So they set off for Troy with 1000 ships holding 50,000 Greeks. With the help of Achilles, the Greeks are able to fight the never-before-defeated Trojans, but they come to a stop by Hector, Prince of Troy.

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious
programme.desc: On the turbo-charged streets of Los Angeles, every night is a championship race. With nitro-boosted fury, Dominic Toretto rules the road, turning all his challengers into dust. He and his rival, Johnny Tran, are the boldest, the baddest, and the best, but now there's new rage on the road. They know he's tough, they know he's fast, but what they don't know is that he's a speed demon detective with enough drive and determination to come out the winner.

programme.title: Gladiator
programme.desc: Forced into slavery by the corrupt heir to the throne, Roman general Maximus becomes a gladiator. His prowess in the arena leads him to Rome, the Colosseum, and a showdown with the new emperor.

programme.title: Gladiator II
programme.desc: After his home is conquered by the tyrannical emperors who now lead Rome, Lucius is forced to enter the Colosseum and must look to his past to find strength to return the glory of Rome to its people.

programme.title: 2 Fast 2 Furious
programme.desc: It's the nitro-fuelled answer to the question: how fast do you like it? Now an ex-cop on the run, Brian O'Connor hooks into outlaw street-racing. When the Feds strong-arm him back, O'Connor's no rules, win-or-die skills are unleashed against an international drug lord. With his velocity-addicted buddy riding shotgun, and a drop-dead-gorgeous undercover agent dialling up the heat, this film accelerates the action into a desperate race for survival, justice and mind-blowing, jaw-dropping speed.

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift
programme.desc: When convicted street racer Sean Boswell tries to start a new life on the other side of the world, his obsession with racing sets him on a collision course with the Japanese underworld. To survive, he will have to master drifting - a new style of racing where tricked-out cars slide through hairpin turns, defying gravity and death for the ultimate road rush.

programme.title: Bad Neighbours
programme.desc: By all appearances, new parents Mac and Kelly Radner are living the American Dream - complete with an adorable baby girl and a beautiful new starter home in the suburbs. Still, the early-thirtysomethings want to believe that they have a modicum of coolness left within them. So when they discover that their new next-door neighbours are none other than dozens of Delta Psi Beta fraternity brothers led by charismatic president Teddy Sanders, they try to play along and make the best of an awkward situation. But when the frat's parties grow increasingly more epic, both sides of the property line begin to fend for their turf. The neighbours' relentless sabotage escalates into outrageous one-upmanship, beginning an epic Greek war for the ages.

programme.title: Minority Report
programme.desc: In the year 2054, the head of a police unit specialising in pre-crime - the arrest and conviction of murderers before they commit their crime - finds himself accused of a future murder.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog 3
programme.desc: Sonic, Knuckles, and Tails face Shadow, a powerful new foe. Outmatched, they form an unexpected alliance to stop him and protect the planet.

programme.title: The Karate Kid (1984)
programme.desc: A new kid in town who is picked on by bullies learns karate and eastern philosophy from Mr Miyagi, and learns how to fight back.

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
programme.desc: The Terminator is now one of the good guys, sent back in time to protect John Connor, the boy destined to lead the freedom fighters of the future. Sarah Connor, John's mother is the quintessential survivor who has been institutionalised for her warning of the nuclear holocaust she knows is inevitable. Together, the threesome must find a way to stop the ultimate enemy - the T-1000, the most lethal Terminator ever created. This visual tour de force is also a touching human story of survival.

programme.title: Ghost
programme.desc: A murdered man returns to save the woman he loves from a similar fate.

programme.title: Message in a Bottle
programme.desc: Grieving widower Garret Blake builds boats for a living, rebuilding his life-that's another matter. But that's before Theresa Osborne comes to his North Carolina village. Theresa, a lonely divorcee and researcher for the Chicago Tribune, knows that Garret is the author of the message she found inside a bottle on a Cape Code beach. And she knows the message spoke to her in a way that profoundly touched her heart. Kevin Costner as Garret and Robin Wright Penn as Theresa bring high-voltage star power to Message in a Bottle, a tale of love lost and found based on Nicholas Sparks' bestseller and directed by Luis Mandoki (White Palace, When a Man Loves a Woman). "You choose-the paste or the future. Pick one and stick with it," Garret's spry father Dodge (Paul Newman) advises. The advice sticks. So does the impact of this tender, movingly filmed tale.

programme.title: Jane Eyre
programme.desc: Based on Charlotte Bronte's classic novel, Mia Wasikowska stars as Jane Eyre in this adaptation of the story of a former orphan who now works as a governess for the wealthy and moody landowner, Mr. Rochester (Michael Fassbender). The isolated and imposing residence and Mr. Rochester's coldness have sorely tested the young woman's resilience, but as Jane reflects upon her past and recovers her natural curiosity, she will learn more of Mr. Rochester and the terrible secret that he is hiding.

programme.title: Failure to Launch
programme.desc: Tripp is a 35-year-old who still lives with his parents. And who can blame him? It's free, he's got a great room, and mum does the laundry. Desperate to get him out of the house, his parents hire a gorgeous woman, Paula, to give him a little ... push. They just didn't expect Tripp would push back!

programme.title: Girls Trip
programme.desc: When four lifelong friends travel to New Orleans for the annual Essence Festival, sisterhoods are rekindled, wild sides are rediscovered, and there's enough dancing, drinking, brawling and romancing to make the Big Easy blush.

programme.title: The Fabulous Four
programme.desc: If three's a crowd, four's a party! A group of life-long friends travel to Key West, Florida, to be bridesmaids in the surprise wedding of their best college girlfriend Marilyn. Over the course of one outrageous trip, sisterhoods are rekindled, the past resurfaces, and there are enough sparks, raunch, and romance to change all their lives in unexpected ways.

programme.title: Ghost
programme.desc: A murdered man returns to save the woman he loves from a similar fate.

programme.title: Message in a Bottle
programme.desc: Grieving widower Garret Blake builds boats for a living, rebuilding his life-that's another matter. But that's before Theresa Osborne comes to his North Carolina village. programme.title: The Fabulous Four

Over the course of one outrageous trip, sisterhoods are rekindled, the past resurfaces, and there are enough sparks, raunch, and romance to change all their lives in unexpected ways.

programme.title: Marry Me
programme.desc: A heartbroken pop star spontaneously weds a stranger from the audience while live on stage, but their sham marriage turns into a real romance.

programme.title: It Ends with Us
programme.desc: Lily overcomes a traumatic childhood to embark on a new life. A meeting with a neurosurgeon sparks a connection but Lily begins to see sides of him that remind her of her parents' relationship.

programme.title: The Notebook
programme.desc: As teenagers, Allie and Noah begin to fall in love, but they are separated by her upper-class parents who insist that Noah isn't right for her. When they meet years later, their passion is rekindled. Their story is narrated from the present day by an elderly man, telling the tale to a fellow nursing home resident, who is Cassavetes' mother.

programme.title: Julie & Julia
programme.desc: A culinary legend Julia Child provides a frustrated office worker with a new recipe for life - the true stories of how Child's life and cookbook inspired fledgling writer Julie Powell to whip up 524 recipes in 365 days and introduce a new generation to the magic of French cooking. A delicious comedy about joy, obsession and butter. Bon appetit!

programme.title: Mamma Mia!
programme.desc: Sophie has just one wish to make her wedding perfect: to have her father walk her down the aisle. Now she just has to find out who he is. Join the music, laughter and fun of the irresistibly charming musical celebration of mothers, daughters and fathers, and true loves lost and new ones found. Based on the Broadway smash-hit and filled with the ABBA songs you know and love, it's the feel-good experience that will have you singing and dancing over and over again.

programme.title: Mamma Mia! Here We Go Again
programme.desc: Discover Donna's young life, experiencing the fun she had with the three possible dads of Sophie. Sophie is now pregnant. Like Donna, she'll be a young mother, and she realizes that she'll need to take risks like her mother did.

programme.title: Marry Me
programme.desc: A heartbroken pop star spontaneously weds a stranger from the audience while live on stage, but their sham marriage turns into a real romance.

programme.title: It Ends with Us
programme.desc: Lily overcomes a traumatic childhood to embark on a new life. A meeting with a neurosurgeon sparks a connection but Lily begins to see sides of him that remind her of her parents' relationship.

Based on the Broadway smash-hit and filled with the ABBA songs you know and love, it's the feel-good experience that will have you singing and dancing over and over again.

programme.title: Mamma Mia! Here We Go Again
programme.desc: Discover Donna's young life, experiencing the fun she had with the three possible dads of Sophie. Sophie is now pregnant. Like Donna, she'll be a young mother, and she realizes that she'll need to take risks like her mother did.

programme.title: Twisted Nanny
programme.desc: When single mother Julia realizes night nanny Olivia is turning her children against her, Julia must fight to prove that Olivia is not who she says she is before she gets custody of the kids for good.

programme.title: Jarhead: Law of Return
programme.desc: Major Ronan Jackson, an accomplished fighter pilot for the Israel Defense Forces and son of a U.S. Senator, is shot down while flying through Syrian airspace. After miraculously surviving the crash, Jackson is taken captive by a group of Hezbollah militiamen. A gripping and powerful story packed with hard-hitting action, "Jarhead: Law of Return" follows a squad of elite soldiers, led by Sergeant Dave Flores, as they risk their own lives in the hopes of saving an ally they've never met.

programme.title: The Commuter
programme.desc: A businessman is caught up in a criminal conspiracy during his daily commute home. Now a hardworking life insurance salesman and a caring family man, the former police officer, Michael MacCauley, has taken the commuter rail to New York for the past ten years. But, unexpectedly, things will take a turn for the worse, when on one of his daily journeys, the cryptic passenger, Joanna, makes Michael a generous and tempting offer to locate a single commuter or face grave consequences. Is this a sick joke, or is this indeed a serious situation? As Michael races against the clock to solve this wicked conundrum, everyone aboard is a suspect, in a deal where there's definitely more than meets the eye. Can he decide in time who's the one?

programme.title: Where The Crawdads Sing
programme.desc: This is the story of Kya, an abandoned girl who raised herself to adulthood in the dangerous marshlands of North Carolina. For years, rumors of the "Marsh Girl" haunted Barkley Cove, isolating the sharp and resilient Kya from her community. Drawn to two young men from town, Kya opens herself to a new and startling world; but when one of them is found dead, she is immediately cast by the community as the main suspect. As the case unfolds, the verdict as to what actually happened becomes increasingly unclear, threatening to reveal the many secrets that lay within the marsh.

programme.title: Belfast
programme.desc: A poignant story of one boy's childhood amid the music and social tumult of the late 1960s.

programme.title: The Lighthouse
programme.desc: From acclaimed filmmaker Robert Eggers, the writer-director behind "The Witch," comes a spellbinding and atmospheric drama about a pair of lighthouse keepers on a desolate New England island in the 1890s.

programme.title: The Watchers
programme.desc: A 28-year-old artist gets stranded in an expansive, untouched forest in western Ireland. Finding shelter, she meets three strangers who are stalked by mysterious creatures every night.

programme.title: Jarhead: Law of Return
programme.desc: Major Ronan Jackson, an accomplished fighter pilot for the Israel Defense Forces and son of a U.S. Senator, is shot down while flying through Syrian airspace. After miraculously surviving the crash, Jackson is taken captive by a group of Hezbollah militiamen. A gripping and powerful story packed with hard-hitting action, "Jarhead: Law of Return" follows a squad of elite soldiers, led by Sergeant Dave Flores, as they risk their own lives in the hopes of saving an ally they've never met.

programme.title: The Watchers
programme.desc: A 28-year-old artist gets stranded in an expansive, untouched forest in western Ireland. Finding shelter, she meets three strangers who are stalked by mysterious creatures every night.

programme.title: Chris Watts: Confessions of a Killer
programme.desc: A man fails a lie detector test and confesses to brutally murdering his pregnant wife Shan'ann and their two young daughters.

programme.title: The Royal Hotel
programme.desc: Americans Hanna and Liv are best friends backpacking in Australia. After they run out of money, Liv, looking for an adventure, convinces Hanna to take a temporary live-in job behind the bar of a pub called 'The Royal Hotel' in a remote Outback mining town. Bar owner Billy and a host of locals give the girls a riotous introduction to Down Under drinking culture but soon Hanna and Liv find themselves trapped in an unnerving situation that grows rapidly out of their control.

programme.title: The Bourne Supremacy
programme.desc: Suffering from amnesia, Bourne has left his violent past behind and is living a normal life with girlfriend Marie. But his plans for a peaceful life are crushed when he narrowly escapes an assassination attempt. Now hunted by an unknown enemy, Bourne proves to be neither an easy target nor a person whose skill, determination and resilience can be underestimated.

programme.title: Forrest Gump
programme.desc: This film follows a man with a low IQ who has accomplished great things in his life and been present during significant historic events - in each case, far exceeding what anyone imagined he could do. Yet, despite all the things he has attained, his one true love eludes him.

programme.title: Inside Man
programme.desc: A tough cop, a clever bank robber, and a powerbroker fuel a dangerous game of cat-and-mouse full of hidden agendas and explosive surprises.

programme.title: The Da Vinci Code
programme.desc: A Harvard professor implicated in a murder must unravel an ancient code to expose the greatest conspiracy in history.

programme.title: The Bourne Supremacy
programme.desc: Suffering from amnesia, Bourne has left his violent past behind and is living a normal life with girlfriend Marie. But his plans for a peaceful life are crushed when he narrowly escapes an assassination attempt. Now hunted by an unknown enemy, Bourne proves to be neither an easy target nor a person whose skill, determination and resilience can be underestimated.

programme.title: The Royal Hotel
programme.desc: Americans Hanna and Liv are best friends backpacking in Australia. After they run out of money, Liv, looking for an adventure, convinces Hanna to take a temporary live-in job behind the bar of a pub called 'The Royal Hotel' in a remote Outback mining town. Bar owner Billy and a host of locals give the girls a riotous introduction to Down Under drinking culture but soon Hanna and Liv find themselves trapped in an unnerving situation that grows rapidly out of their control.

programme.title: The Bourne Supremacy
programme.desc: Suffering from amnesia, Bourne has left his violent past behind and is living a normal life with girlfriend Marie. But his plans for a peaceful life are crushed when he narrowly escapes an assassination attempt. Now hunted by an unknown enemy, Bourne proves to be neither an easy target nor a person whose skill, determination and resilience can be underestimated.

programme.title: Forrest Gump
programme.desc: This film follows a man with a low IQ who has accomplished great things in his life and been present during significant historic events - in each case, far exceeding what anyone imagined he could do. Yet, despite all the things he has attained, his one true love eludes him.

programme.title: Supercars Mini
programme.desc: Race 18 is set to begin with a tightly bunched leaderboard and multiple title contenders neck-and-neck. The combination of Darwin's heat and the layout of the Hidden Valley circuit make it one of the more challenging places to overtake.

programme.title: Supercars Mini
programme.desc: The Darwin Triple Crown wraps up with a 70 lap, 200-kilometre, two-stop race around Hidden Valley Raceway. Will the unpredictable nature of this circuit deliver a surprise winner?

programme.title: Supercars Mini
programme.desc: After dominating in Darwin, Broc Feeney has built a sizeable lead heading into the first of three races in Townsville. With two Sprint Cup rounds remaining, Feeney could clinch the Sprint Cup trophy as soon as this weekend.

programme.title: Supercars Mini
programme.desc: Fresh off his recent stint in NASCAR, can reigning Supercars Champion Will Brown make it to a podium finish in Townsville?

programme.title: Supercars Mini
programme.desc: Penrite Racing's Matthew Payne will be aiming to taste success on the streets of Townsville once again as the final race of the weekend begins.

programme.title: Supercars Mini
programme.desc: For the first time, the new Gen3 cars race at Queensland Raceway. All eyes will be on Broc Feeney, who holds a commanding 220-point lead in the Sprint Cup standings.

programme.title: Supercars Mini
programme.desc: Drivers are under pressure to secure a top 10 position to qualify for the inaugural Finals Series. Will Brown and Matt Payne will be looking to close the gap and keep their championship aspirations alive.

programme.title: Supercars Mini
programme.desc: The final race of the weekend sees a driver crowned the inaugural Sprint Cup Champion.

programme.title: Supercars Mini

programme.title: Supercars Mini
programme.desc: The stage is set as 27 cars and 54 drivers tackle the legendary Mount Panorama Circuit for 161 laps and their shot at Bathurst glory.

programme.title: Supercars Mini
programme.desc: The title chase starts here in the Elimination Final. Championship leader Broc Feeney, Bathurst 1000 winner Matthew Payne, and defending champion Will Brown headline the field.

programme.title: Supercars Mini
programme.desc: The last 250-kilometre race on the demanding street circuit determines the final automatic qualifiers for the next Finals round. The three drivers with the fewest points will be eliminated from the title chase.

programme.title: Supercars Mini
programme.desc: This race is the first shot for drivers to secure a top four spot for the Grand Final. Broc Feeney leads but Chaz Mostert is a threat after his Gold Coast sweep. Defending champ Will Brown is fighting for survival.

programme.title: Supercars Mini
programme.desc: Last chance to make the big dance where the championship field of seven drivers will be ruthlessly slashed to the final four heading to the Adelaide Grand Final.

programme.title: Supercars Mini

programme.title: Supercars Mini

programme.title: Supercars Mini

programme.title: MotoGP Mini

programme.title: MotoGP Mini
programme.desc: Following on from his opening weekend in Thailand, Marc Marquez is eyeing off another victory to start the season.

programme.title: MotoGP Mini
programme.desc: Marc Marquez and brother Alex have had an electric start to this season, finishing first and second in the first two races of the season.

programme.title: MotoGP Mini
programme.desc: After crashing out while leading at COTA, Marc Marquez now trails brother Alex by a point in the drivers championship standings.

programme.title: MotoGP Mini
programme.desc: Marc Marquez bounced back with a huge victory in Qatar and will look to increase his lead this week at his home track in Spain.

programme.title: MotoGP Mini
programme.desc: With a victory in Spain, Alex Marquez now holds a one-point lead over Marc as the Grand Prix of France begins.

programme.title: MotoGP Mini
programme.desc: At Silverstone, Fabio Quartararo starts from pole position for the third consecutive race, and will be hoping this can be his first victory of 2025.

programme.title: MotoGP Mini
programme.desc: After taking out the sprint race, Marc Marquez can add another win in 2025 at the Aragon Grand Prix.

programme.title: MotoGP Mini
programme.desc: Another win from Marc Marquez sees his lead extend at the top of the MotoGP standings as the riders head to Italy.

programme.title: MotoGP Mini
programme.desc: Marc Marquez is the one to beat sitting atop of the MotoGP standings as riders head to the TT Circuit Assen.

programme.title: MotoGP Mini
programme.desc: Marc Marquez arrives into an emblematic venue in Germany. Over the years he has made the Sachsenring his kingdom with 8 race wins. Can he be halted against the odds?

programme.title: MotoGP Mini
programme.desc: After a 4-year absence a true classic venue laced with history is back and with summer break incoming, the stakes are high as Marc Marquez aims to continue his dominance.

programme.title: MotoGP Mini
programme.desc: Marc Marquez made history by becoming the first Ducati rider to take five wins in a row. Amazingly, he's yet to claim victory at the Red Bull Ring.

programme.title: MotoGP Mini
programme.desc: All eyes will be on championship leader Marc Marquez, who starts on pole. He enters the weekend having won an astonishing six consecutive Grand Prix races and holds a commanding 142-point lead in the standings.

programme.title: MotoGP Mini
programme.desc: Championship leader Marc Marquez looks to defend his top spot on a circuit where he is without a win since 2019.

programme.title: MotoGP Mini
programme.desc: Marco Bezzecchi starts from pole at his home race, but a confident Alex Marquez will aim for a second straight victory.

programme.title: MotoGP Mini
programme.desc: On the cusp of one of the greatest comebacks in sporting history, Marc Marquez is vying to take back the throne and become a 7-time World Champion.

programme.title: MotoGP Mini
programme.desc: Newly crowned champion Marc Marquez will fight to break his Mandalika winless streak. While Alex Marquez and Francesco Bagnaia fiercely contest the runner-up spot.

programme.title: MotoGP Mini
programme.desc: The race for the championship runner-up position is fiercely on between Alex Marquez and Francesco Bagnaia. Australian Jack Miller hunts a coveted home podium finish.

programme.title: MotoGP Mini
programme.desc: Alex Marquez defends the championship runner-up spot against a surging Marco Bezzecchi, who hasn't been able to take victory since Silverstone back in May.

programme.title: MotoGP Mini
programme.desc: The fight for third in the championship between Marco Bezzecchi, Francesco Bagnaia and Pedro Acosta reaches its climax in the penultimate round of the season.

programme.title: MotoGP
programme.desc: The battle for third place overall is a straight-up duel between the resurgent Marco Bezzecchi and former champion Francesco Bagnaia, with Bezzecchi holding a slight points advantage after his victory in Portugal.

programme.title: MotoGP
programme.desc: The race for third place dominates the finale. Marco Bezzecchi aims to seal the bronze medal win ahead of Francesco Bagnaia.

programme.sub-title: MotoGP: Martin: From Heaven to Hell
programme.desc: Go inside Jorge Martin's turbulent 2025 season - a year of shattered plans, brutal injuries, and an off-track storm no one saw coming. For the reigning World Champion, the title defence ended before it began.

programme.desc: The official film of the unforgettable 2025 Masters, where Rory McIlroy ended his agonising wait for the career Grand Slam in a dramatic play-off with Ryder Cup teammate Justin Rose.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: For the past several decades, two months out of every year, a truly historic event occurs. Truckers in the world's most dangerous tundras carry vital equipment to remote outposts located hundreds of miles north of civilisation and all the roads are temporarily created by frozen bodies of water. The mission is to transport thousands of loads before the road literally disappears into the sea. Like their trailblazing forefathers, these truckers continue to carry on the lone wolf entrepreneurial spirit that built America, taking huge risks in the hopes of receiving huge rewards. Continuing this groundbreaking series, our truckers will once again embark on a race against the elements, against time and against each other. The series will continue to examine this time honoured profession that dates back almost a century, often through generations of families.

programme.title: Desert Collectors
programme.desc: We kick this episode off with Charles and his impressive neon and light up sign collection.

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: In North Yorkshire, the Traffic Cops lie in wait and hunt down suspects thought be dealing drugs.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Steve Grahame is sending one of his best mates, Slick, to face the hostility of the outback. It's the last desert run before Christmas and Slick's promised his family he'll definitely make it home, he just has to do a 1900 kilometre trek through the Central Australian desert first. In drought ravaged New South Wales Chaz Butt is making a mercy run delivering much needed hay and water to give farmers a fighting chance of survival during the biggest dry spell in half a century.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: When a World War II mortar storms the shop, can Chum fire up a deal before it implodes? Then, Rick Walks the Line when deciding to buy handcuffs from an iconic prison.

programme.title: Cabin Truckers
programme.desc: There's a dream home - and there's a dream location. Cabin Truckers follows the incredible exploits of hauling colossal cabins to remote, picturesque locations. Watch as an expert team navigates through extremely rocky, mountainous terrain, delivering precious cargo to thrilled homeowners. Tara Rosen and Brad Wilson have found the ideal house and plot. But first they need to haul the 1040 square foot house to Wades shop yard where it will sit until the foundation is ready.

programme.title: Cabin Truckers
programme.desc: Keith Chitwood finds a four bedroom, two storey home 60km away. Wade's team must work out if they can move one of the largest houses they have ever tackled.

programme.desc: Only Emma Sidi has yet to win an episode, and it may be her time. Greg Davies gags after opening a big jar, Andy Zaltzman makes a robot sing, and a blond Jack Dee discusses hedgehogs.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: In Idaho, Kidd and Harry Youren navigate the raging rapids of the Snake River to deliver a scow boat to its new owner. In Montana, Tom Oar teaches 9-year-old Hank McAfee all about trapping. Jake Herak unleashes his young pups on the Mountain Lions of the Tobacco Roots but takes a nasty fall high in the backcountry. Eustace Conway uses all his backwoods skills to build the ultimate firepit for Turtle Island. In Alaska, Martha and Eli Tansy get to work on an all-terrain vehicle that can take on the frozen backcountry of Alaska.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor
programme.desc: This show tells the real life stories of members of the public as they share their experiences, often for the first time. In this episode, entities possess an old photograph, a motorbike and even a vintage car.

programme.title: Idiot TV
programme.desc: Idiot TV features water mishaps, holiday disasters and the world's worst toilet. Meet lonely Pavel and enjoy DJ Steve's drum and bass remix.

programme.title: Car Crash TV

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: In small towns and along America's back roads, treasures are waiting to be uncovered, valuable relics from history that are hidden in junk piles, buried in barns, and stacked in garages. It takes special experts to find these lost artefacts and hopefully turn rust to riches. Follow two of the most skilled 'pickers' - Mike Wolfe, owner of Antique Archaeology, and his business partner, Frank Fritz - as they hunt down objects with historical, collectible, and pop culture value that have been long forgotten by their owners. Along the way, they meet people whose own stories open a window into American lives and history.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Mike climbs Kodiak Island's highest peaks to take down a mountain goat, then repels down sheer cliffs to bring home his harvest. Martha and Elli use their tracked vehicle to scout new hunting grounds. Tom and Sean canoe into new waters to trap beaver. Jake and his young pups become stranded and are forced to hike out of the mountains at night. Josh has a plan to heat his outpost cabin and brings in some heavy machinery to get the job done.

programme.title: Idiot TV
programme.desc: Fails include workplace blunders, silly weddings and top historical falls. Eugosto de Fundos covers Brazil's latest events.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob and Steelo welcome Nina Agdal to come face-to-face with danger in Eight Legs of Terror, spend some time in The Most Dangerous Room and go to the construction site.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.sub-title: A Dance As Old As Time Itself
programme.desc: Little Alex Horne has many talents, but Rosie Jones is keen to find out if he can wield a pair of pliers. Jack Dee adopts a charismatic New York accent.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Packed with dramatic bidding, intense rivalries and quirky personalities, follow treasure hunters Darrell, Brandon, Jarrod, and Brandi as they seek to score big in the high-stakes world of storage auctions.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Kenny tries to bribe the competition in Canyon Country and becomes more worldly as a result; Ivy and Isaiah make the most of their purchase; Brandi takes on the powers of darkness.

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: In North Yorkshire, the Traffic Cops are out in force on a Bank Holiday weekend.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: In the Northern Territory the Water Drillers, Anthony and Danyelle Haigh, enlist a new team member as family life on the road puts their marriage to the test. Slick's cross country race home for Christmas looks to be slipping out of reach. A last minute order for three more trailers of building supplies means he has to do the entire journey again. In Southern Queensland rookie cattle trucker Kylie Hornick has her first crack at driving a triple road train, transporting 800 head of cattle while husband David tries some backseat driving.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: For the past several decades, two months out of every year, a truly historic event occurs. Truckers in the world's most dangerous tundras carry vital equipment to remote outposts located hundreds of miles north of civilisation and all the roads are temporarily created by frozen bodies of water. The mission is to transport thousands of loads before the road literally disappears into the sea. Like their trailblazing forefathers, these truckers continue to carry on the lone wolf entrepreneurial spirit that built America, taking huge risks in the hopes of receiving huge rewards. Continuing this groundbreaking series, our truckers will once again embark on a race against the elements, against time and against each other. The series will continue to examine this time honoured profession that dates back almost a century, often through generations of families.

programme.desc: Five crystal-hunting teams set out to confront the extreme conditions of the Australian Outback, hoping to unearth some of the world's rarest and most breathtaking crystals.

programme.desc: Host Ronny Chieng interviews actor and producer Lucy Liu, promoting her film "Rosemead."

programme.desc: Dom and Kay join the Met Police in the hope of cleaning up their community but are thrust into the murky world of deep cover infiltration as they become part of a criminal enterprise.

programme.title: Car Crash TV

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: In small towns and along America's back roads, treasures are waiting to be uncovered, valuable relics from history that are hidden in junk piles, buried in barns, and stacked in garages. programme.title: Idiot TV
programme.desc: Gym fails, awful dancing and natural selection gone wrong feature, with slope reports from Tristram Ponsonby Crum and DJ Steve's musical mix.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Fern Brady complains about being forced to tidy up, while Dara O Briain shows off a fab flair for folding.

programme.title: Ice Vikings
programme.desc: Trevor is set to finish early for the year; Chris, nearing the end of the season, begins pulling up his nets until a phone call puts his entire season back on the ice; the Husavik Crew race to reach their quota.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: For two months out of every year, a group of exceptional men find their way to the Canadian tundra to undertake one of the most dangerous jobs on earth. In the thick of winter, truckers in giant eighteen wheelers carry vital equipment and supplies to miners hundreds of miles away. In blizzard conditions, these truckers travel over ice roads that often take them over frozen lakes. Each man is trained in self survival, from fixing his truck in sub zero conditions in seconds to escaping from a truck if the ice cracks. On the other end of the journey are miners whose lives depend on the truckers making it to their base, year after year. The episodes will form a narrative arch - taking the viewer on a journey from when the experienced and novice truckers first sign up for the season, to the last truck making it back to base.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Tackling the toughest roads and heaviest loads, Outback Truckers is back for an exciting 6th season! Facing extremes of drought ravaged land to rain drenched roads that leave you stranded for days, these determined truckers battle the elements on every job they do.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Tackling the toughest roads and heaviest loads, Outback Truckers is back for an exciting 6th season! Facing extremes of drought ravaged land to rain drenched roads that leave you stranded for days, these determined truckers battle the elements on every job they do.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: Rick Dale, one of Pawn Stars' most popular experts, runs Las Vegas based Rick's Restorations, a family business that finds, restores and upcycles cool objects ranging from Cadillacs to Coke Machines. The before and after reveals of his work are always highlights, in part because of the history nuggets Rick Dale shares about each object, whether it's a barber chair or a gas pump. In this spinoff series, featuring the dynamic characters at Rick's workplace, viewers will watch a variety of objects be bought, bartered and transformed, learning the process of restoration; how do you duplicate Coke machine red? Where can you find 1920s tires? A storyteller who works with tools instead of a pen, Rick shares when and why objects were invented, who used them and how fixing or transforming them changes their value.

programme.title: Run
programme.desc: When Brenden Abbott pulls off a daring bank robbery in suburban Perth, his plan is to use the score to build his dream life with the woman he loves, Jackie. However, his dreams are shattered when his loose-lipped accomplices are caught and betray him. Sent to Fremantle's brutal maximum-security prison, Brenden refuses to surrender. Armed with charm, intellect, and a meticulous mind, he begins plotting the impossible: an escape that will become one of the most audacious in Australian history.

channel.display-name: [Optus TV feat. Foxtel] Family HD / MO7

programme.title: Early Man
programme.desc: Set at the dawn of time when prehistoric creatures roamed the earth, Early Man tells the story of courageous caveman Dug and his sidekick Hognob who, together with their fearless new friend Goona, must unite their Stone Age Tribe against the mighty Bronze Age enemy, Lord Nooth.

programme.title: The Bad Guys
programme.desc: The Bad Guys are the most notorious criminals in the world, pulling off a lifetime of legendary heists, but can the gang of misfits pull off their biggest job yet: going good?

programme.title: Hook
programme.desc: Peter Banning is a 40-year-old corporate takeover lawyer who has lost any memory of being Peter Pan. Peter and his family travel to London to visit Granny Wendy. Peter discovers a note from Captain Hook informing Peter that he has kidnapped his children. With the encouragement of Tinkerbell, Peter once again takes wing, and it's off to Neverland to rescue his kids.

programme.title: Babe
programme.desc: The inspirational story of a shy Yorkshire piglet who doesn't quite know his place in the world. But when Farmer Hoggett wins him at the county fair, Babe discovers that he can be anything he wants to be - even an award-winning sheepdog. With the help of a delightful assortment of barnyard friends, the heroic little pig is headed for the challenge of his life in this endearing and fun-filled tale the whole family will love.

programme.title: Sing 2
programme.desc: Buster Moon and his friends must persuade reclusive rock star Clay Calloway to join them for the opening of a new show.

programme.title: Shrek 2
programme.desc: Happily ever after will have to wait as Shrek, Princess Fiona, and Donkey visit the in-laws. Outraged that Fiona has wed an ogre, the King hires hit man Puss in Boots to make the problem disappear.

programme.title: Abominable
programme.desc: When teenage Yi encounters a young Yeti on the roof of her apartment building in a modern Chinese city, she and her mischievous friends, Jin and Peng, name him Everest and embark on an epic quest to reunite the magical creature with his family at the highest point on Earth. But the trio of friends will have to stay one-step ahead of Burnish, a wealthy man intent on capturing a Yeti, and zoologist Dr. Zara to help Everest get home.

programme.title: Megamind
programme.desc: Megamind is the most brilliant super-villain the world has ever known, and the least successful. Over the years he has tried to conquer Metro City in every imaginable way. Each attempt, a colossal failure thanks to the caped superhero known as Metro Man, until the day Megamind actually defeats him in the throes of one of his botched evil plans. Suddenly, the fate of Metro City is threatened when a new villain arrives and chaos runs rampant, leaving everyone to wonder: can the world's biggest 'mind' actually save the day?

programme.title: Trolls World Tour
programme.desc: Poppy and Branch discover that there are six different troll tribes scattered over six different lands. Each tribe is also devoted to six different kinds of music - funk, country, techno, classical, pop and rock. When rockers Queen Barb and King Thrash set out to destroy the other music, Poppy and Branch embark on a daring mission to unite the trolls and save the diverse melodies from becoming extinct.

programme.title: Madagascar: Escape 2 Africa
programme.desc: Alex, Morty and other zoo animals find a way to escape from Madagascar when the penguins reassemble a wrecked airplane. The precariously repaired craft stays airborne just long enough to make it to the African continent. There the New Yorkers encounter members of their own species for the first time. Africa proves to be a wild place, but Alex and company wonder if it is better than their Central Park home.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Pets
programme.desc: Taking place in a Manhattan apartment building, Max's life as a favourite pet is turned upside down, when his owner brings home a sloppy mongrel named Duke. They have to put their quarrels behind when they find out that an adorable white bunny named Snowball is building an army of lost pets determined to take revenge.

programme.title: Chicken Run
programme.desc: While the chickens on evil Mrs Tweedy's farm dream of a better life, a clever hen named Ginger is hatching plans to fly the coop for good. The only problem is, chickens can't fly or can they? Every escape attempt goes fowl until Rocky, a smooth-talking All-American rooster, crash-lands into the coop. It's hardly poultry in motion when Rocky attempts to teach Ginger and her fine feathered friends to fly but, with teamwork, determination and a little bit of cluck, the fearless flock plots one last daring attempt in a spectacular bid for freedom! Featuring unforgettable characters, incredible animation and all-star voice talent, this instant classic from the academy Award-winning creators of Wallace & Gromit is eggs-traordinary fun for the whole family!

programme.title: Minions
programme.desc: Starting as single-celled yellow organisms, Minions evolve through the ages, perpetually serving the most despicable of masters. Continuously unsuccessful at keeping these masters, from T-rex to Napoleon, the Minions find themselves without someone to serve and fall into a deep depression. One Minion named Kevin has a plan, and he, alongside teenage rebel Stuart and lovable little Bob, ventures out into the world to find a new evil boss for his brethren to follow. The trio embarks upon a thrilling journey that ultimately leads them to their next potential master, Scarlet Overkill, the world's first-ever female supervillain. They travel from frigid Antarctica to 1960s New York City, ending in mod London, where they must face their biggest challenge to-date: saving all of Minionkind from annihilation.

programme.title: Spirit Untamed
programme.desc: The next chapter in this beloved franchise begins as a young girl finds a connection to her mother's legacy as a trick rider and forms a bond with a wild mustang named Spirit.

programme.title: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial
programme.desc: While visiting the Earth at Night, a group of alien botanists is discovered and disturbed by an approaching human task force. Because of the more than hasty take-off, one of the visitors is left behind. The little alien finds himself all alone on a very strange planet. Fortunately, the extra-terrestrial soon finds a friend and emotional companion in 10-year-old Elliot, who discovered him looking for food in his family's garden shed. While E.T. slowly gets acquainted with Elliot's brother Michael, his sister Gertie as well as with Earth customs, members of the task force work day and night to track down the whereabouts of Earth's first visitor from Outer Space.

programme.title: Open Season: Scared Silly
programme.desc: When a case of mistaken identity leads both humans and animals to believe there is a werewolf on the prowl, former hunter Shaw tries to reopen open season.

programme.title: Spirit: Stallion of the Cimarron
programme.desc: A tale which follows the adventures of a wild and rambunctious mustang stallion as he journeys through the untamed American frontiers, encountering man for the first time, Spirit defies being broken, even as he develops a remarkable friendship with a young Lakota brave named Little Creek. The young stallion also finds love with a beautiful paint mare named Rain on his way to becoming one of the greatest unsung heroes of the Old West.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Ninja
programme.desc: An elite society of Japanese warriors has prophesised that one day a blonde-haired fair-skinned child will come to their village and lead them as a fighter of a remarkable skill and bravery. So when an American child who fell overboard on an ocean liner washes up on their shores, they adopt him as one of their own and patiently instruct him in the ways of a ninja. Trouble is, the child, whom they name Haru, grows up to be fat, clumsy, not especially bright, and startlingly inept as a warrior. Undaunted, Haru struggles on with his ninja training, and when Alison, a beautiful woman from America, requests a ninja fighter to return with her to the states and protect her from her criminal-minded boyfriend and his Yakuza associates, Haru eagerly accepts the assignment. Haru's minders see trouble brewing, so they secretly send along a fellow ninja, Gobei, to watch his back, although this hardly prevents Haru from posing a deadly menace to inanimate objects everywhere.

programme.title: The Karate Kid (1984)
programme.desc: A new kid in town who is picked on by bullies learns karate and eastern philosophy from Mr Miyagi, and learns how to fight back.

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: In the brand new adventure Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle, the tables are turned as four teenagers are sucked into the world of Jumanji. When four high-school kids discover an old video game console with a game they've never heard of Jumanji they are immediately drawn into the game's jungle setting, literally becoming the avatars they chose: gamer Spencer becomes a brawny adventurer; football jock Fridge loses (in his words) 'the top two feet of his body' and becomes an Einstein; popular girl Bethany becomes a middle-aged male professor; and wallflower Martha becomes a badass warrior. What they discover is that you don't just play Jumanji you must survive it. To beat the game and return to the real world, they'll have to go on the most dangerous adventure of their lives, discover what Alan Parrish left 20 years ago, and change the way they think about themselves or they'll be stuck in the game forever.

programme.title: The Wild Robot
programme.desc: Shipwrecked on a deserted island, a robot named Roz must learn to adapt to its new surroundings. Building relationships with the native animals, Roz soon develops a parental bond with an orphaned gosling.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie
programme.desc: In this hilarious animated adventure comedy, you'll finally find out why the birds are so angry. In an island paradise populated entirely by happy, flightless birds - or almost entirely, Red, a bird with a temper problem, speedy Chuck, and the volatile Bomb have always been outsiders. But when the island is visited by mysterious green piggies, it's up to these unlikely outcasts to figure out what the pigs are up to.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming
programme.desc: A young Peter Parker/Spider-Man begins to navigate his new-found identity as the web-slinging superhero. Thrilled by his experience with the Avengers, Peter returns home where he lives with his Aunt May, under the watchful eye of his new mentor, Tony Stark. Peter tries to fall back into his normal daily routine - distracted by thoughts of proving himself to be more than just your friendly neighbourhood Spider-Man. But when the Vulture emerges as a new villain, everything that Peter holds most important will be threatened.

programme.title: Bookworm
programme.desc: 11-year-old Mildred's world is turned upside down when her estranged father, the washed-up magician Strawn Wise, comes to look after her and agrees to take her camping to find a mythological beast known as the Canterbury Panther.

programme.title: The Karate Kid (2010)
programme.desc: Dre, a young boy, finds himself bullied by Cheng, a rebellious kung fu prodigy at his school. However, things change after he befriends Mr Han, a maintenance man, who happens to be a kung fu expert.

programme.title: An American Tail
programme.desc: Fievel the mouse travels from Russia to America with his family in the late 1800s to seek freedom from cat persecution.

programme.title: An American Tail: Fievel Goes West
programme.desc: Lured out west by the crafty Cat R. Waul, Fievel joins forces with famed lawdog Wylie Blurp to thwart a sinister plot to transform unsuspecting settlers into mouse burgers!

programme.title: Tom & Jerry
programme.desc: A legendary rivalry re-emerges when Jerry moves into New York City's finest hotel on the eve of the wedding of the century, forcing the desperate event planner to hire Tom to get rid of him. As mayhem ensues, the escalating cat-and-mouse battle soon threatens to destroy her career, the wedding, and possibly the hotel itself.

programme.title: Fun Mom Dinner
programme.desc: Four mums, whose only common ground is their kids' preschool class, get together for a dinner. The night begins as a disaster, but they have more in common than they thought.

programme.title: The Whole Nine Yards
programme.desc: Well, there goes the neighbourhood - in a pine box. When hit man Jimmy "The Tulip" Tudeski moves into a comfy suburb, everyone's suddenly in danger of pushing up daisies. And it's not all Jimmy's doing either. Jonathan Lynn directs and a talented ensemble cast packs heat in this manic comedy about life, love and plenty of ammo. Bruce Willis plays Jimmy, whose arrival sparks a chain reaction in which just about everybody wants to clip somebody else. Matthew Perry plays a hapless dentist who finds a way to get on the Tulip's good and bad sides.

programme.title: Daddy's Home 2
programme.desc: Having finally gotten used to each other's existence, Brad and Dusty must now deal with their intrusive fathers during the holidays.

programme.title: Dolittle
programme.desc: After losing his wife seven years earlier, the eccentric Dr. John Dolittle, famed doctor and veterinarian of Queen Victoria's England, hermits himself away behind the high walls of Dolittle Manor with only his menagerie of exotic animals for company. But when the young queen falls gravely ill, a reluctant Dolittle is forced to set sail on an epic adventure to a mythical island in search of a cure, regaining his wit and courage as he crosses old adversaries and discovers wondrous creatures.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: Pet Detective
programme.desc: He's the best there is. In fact, he's the only one there is! He's Ace Ventura, pet detective, and he's on the case to find the Miami Dolphins' missing mascot, and quarterback Dan Marino. He goes eyeball to eyeball with a man-eating shark, stakes out the Miami Dolphins, and woos and wows the ladies. Whether he's undercover, under fire, or underwater, he always gets his man or beast.

programme.title: Police Academy 2: Their First Assignment
programme.desc: They've graduated... and they're loose on the streets! Somehow, the members of this oddball squad of eccentrics have earned their badges. Now on their first assignment, they must use all the wits in their relatively limited capacity to tackle hoodlums and a local gang. But they must also overcome the rogue officers within their own precinct who are trying to thwart their bumbling efforts.

programme.title: Ghostbusters: Afterlife
programme.desc: When a single mother and her two kids arrive in a small town, they begin to discover their connection to the original Ghostbusters and the secret legacy their grandfather left behind.

programme.title: Fun Mom Dinner
programme.desc: Four mums, whose only common ground is their kids' preschool class, get together for a dinner. The night begins as a disaster, but they have more in common than they thought.

programme.title: Ghostbusters: Afterlife
programme.desc: When a single mother and her two kids arrive in a small town, they begin to discover their connection to the original Ghostbusters and the secret legacy their grandfather left behind.

programme.title: Talladega Nights: The Ballad of Ricky Bobby
programme.desc: NASCAR stock car racing sensation Ricky Bobby is a national hero because of his "win at all costs" approach. He and his loyal racing partner, childhood friend Cal Naughton Jr., are a fearless duo - "Shake" and "Bake" by their fans for their ability to finish so many races in the #1 and #2 positions, with Cal always in second place. When flamboyant French Formula One driver Jean Girard challenges "Shake" and "Bake" for the supremacy of NASCAR, Ricky Bobby must face his own demons and fight Girard for the right to be known as racing's top driver.

programme.title: I Now Pronounce You Chuck & Larry
programme.desc: Chuck Levine and Larry Valentine are fire fighters and true-blue buddies. When Larry, a widower, learns he cannot name his children as beneficiaries on his life insurance policy, he needs a big favour from Chuck: Sign on as Larry's domestic partner. The pals unexpectedly become front-page news and must carry the masquerade to extremes when an overzealous bureaucrat becomes suspicious of their true relationship.

programme.title: The War With Grandpa
programme.desc: When grandfather Ed moves in, Peter is forced to give up his bedroom. Unwilling to tolerate this injustice, Peter devises a series of pranks to drive him out.

programme.title: Meet the Fockers
programme.desc: Domestic disaster looms for nurse Greg Focker when his straight-laced, ex-CIA father-in-law, Jack Byrnes, asks to meet his parents before the wedding.

programme.title: Little Nicky
programme.desc: When Satan reneges on his plans to retire, two of his three heirs leave Hell for New York City to gather enough souls to vote the Prince of Darkness out of office. But Satan sends his youngest and nicest son, Little Nicky, to bring his two treacherous brothers home.

programme.title: Big Daddy
programme.desc: In this romantic comedy, Sonny Koufax is a carefree slob trying to save his love life by becoming responsible. He gets the chance when a cute kid turns up needing a father.

programme.title: Housos Vs. Authority
programme.desc: Three housing commission tenants take a road trip to Uluru. Fat Pizza's Paul Fenech brings his scandalous TV series Housos to the big screen in this outrageously rude comedy.

credits.director: pot-smoking adventurers who find their counter-culture lifestyle threatened by the encroaching confines of the Establishment. One of the cultural landmarks of the late 1960s
tt was also an unexpected commercial success
grossing over $19 million at the box office
earning Fonda an Oscar nomination for Best Screenplay
and contributing to Hollywood's new interest in young audiences and socially relevant movies.Following the film's success
now both a cult hero and a millionaire
went on to collaborate with Hopper again on 1971's The Last Movie. The film didn't enjoy the acclaim of their previous collaboration
and Fonda's subsequent efforts of that decade also failed to live up to the stature of Easy Rider. One possible exception was the 1974 sleeper Dirty Mary
a film in which Fonda appeared to finance his directorial projects
one of which was Wanda Nevada
a 1979 film that featured his father. Increasingly
Fonda became better-known for his activities off-screen than on: his status as an anti-Establishment figurehead was enhanced when John Lennon wrote the song "She Said She Said" about him. Reportedly
it was inspired by a bad acid trip the musician had taken
during which Fonda repeatedly told him
"I know what it's like to be dead
man."Fonda's screen career continued its downward spiral during the 1980s
and towards the end of that decade it was once again overshadowed by that of a family member
who had exiled himself from L.A. in 1969 to live in Montana
seemed more aware of this than anyone: in an interview
"I was Captain America and where....can you go with that? You can only ride so many motorcycles and smoke so many joints." But in the mid-1990s
Fonda's career began to get some much-needed resuscitation. After making a cameo appearance in Bodies
he had a starring role in Michael Almereyda's Nadja (1994) and essentially parodied himself in John Carpenter's Escape From L.A. (1996). Fonda's true comeback was Ulee's Gold
Victor Nunez's 1997 exploration of loss and family ties. He won raves for his portrayal of the title character
and the Best Actor Oscar nomination he received for the film served as the industry's formal recognition of his re-emergence as a Hollywood player. The actor
always one to play by his own rules
next rejected mainstream Hollywood fare to star in Steven Soderbergh's The Limey in 1999

and earning uniformly excellent reviews. He also starred in The Passion of Ayn Rand as the author's long-suffering husband; the film premiered at that year's Sundance Film Festival. He branched out into kids films with a leading role in Thomas and the Magic Railroad in 2000
and appeared in The Laramie Project one year later. He continued to work steadily
often taking smaller parts in bigger movies like Supernova
and Wild Hogs. He was a fearsome

and authentic Western presence in James Mangold's remake of 3:10 to Yuma in 2007. In 2011 he paid tribute to the man who helped launch his career by sitting down for interviews in Corman's World: Exploits of a Hollywood Rebel. Nicolas Cage Eva Mendes (Actor) Born: March 05
United States Trivia: A fiercely independent actress who refuses to be pressed into a conventional mode or typecast

Eva Mendes was studying marketing in the late '90s when an agent stumbled across her photo while perusing Mendes's neighbor's portfolio. She soon appeared in an Aerosmith video and made her film debut in Children of the Corn V: Fields of Terror. Mendes next appeared in a few made-for-television productions and hammed it up with Will Ferrell and Chris Kattan in A Night at the Roxbury before being cast in a prominent role in Urban Legends: Final Cut. Working against typecasting despite her teen horror resumé
Mendes next took roles in Exit Wounds
and All About the Benjamins. Mendes next began work on a children's book titled Crazy Leggs Beshee in which she wanted to introduce art
and values to children in a fun and easily comprehendable medium.In 2003

with the actress taking on large roles in an ecclectic quartet of high-profile films. In 2 Fast 2 Furious she played a customs agent working with Paul Walker to bring down a Miami drug cartel. Out of Time found her reteaming with Training Day costar Denzel Washington. Flexing her comedic chops
Mendes was the love interest of half a pair of conjoined twins in the Farrelly brothers' Stuck on You. And in Once Upon a Time in Mexico she played another government agent
this time opposite Johnny Depp.Mendes would go on to appear in a number of films over the coming years
and Girl in Progress. She took several years off in order to focus on her growing family
it was announced she would reprise her role from 2 Fast 2 Furious in a future Fast film. Donal Logue (Actor) Born: February 27
average-Joe charisma with a bottomless capacity for shrewd comic timing

Donal Logue earned a reputation in the late '90s as one of the decade's most compelling -- and prolific -- character actors. First winning notice and a dedicated cult following for his portrayal of Jimmy McBride
a cab driver featured in a series of MTV promos
Logue went on to work in a string of films good
and ugly before finally landing his first major starring role in Jenniphr Goodman's 2000 Sundance favorite The Tao of Steve. The son of Irish immigrants
1966. Raised largely in the Southwestern United States
he went on to attend Harvard
where he studied history and began to nurture an interest in theater. Although Logue had long aspired to be a writer
a stint at the British-American Drama Academy in London strengthened his dedication to acting
he began performing on the stage. Logue got his first break in the early '90s

when he began doing the notorious Jimmy the cab driver segments for MTV and won a small role in Robert Redford's Sneakers (1992). Supporting work in films ranging from Little Women (1994) to 3 Ninjas Knuckle Up (1995) to the American remake of Diabolique (1996) followed
as did work on several TV series. In 1999

film audiences were finally given a greater opportunity to see what Logue was capable of when he turned in a scene-stealing performance as a slobby L.A. limo driver with half-baked acting ambitions in The Big Tease
Kevin Allen's light-hearted hairdressing mockumentary. Full-blown appreciation finally came the actor's way the following year

when he starred as the title character of Goodman's The Tao of Steve. A wry comedy about a late-twentysomething slacker whose savvy dating philosophy allows him to win over the ladies despite a gut whose bounty is matched only by the amount of pot he consumes
the film was a great success at the 2000 Sundance Festival

where Logue was awarded a Special Jury Prize for Outstanding Performance.The growing appreciation that surrounded Logue's work was reflected in the number of projects the actor was involved with that same year. Appearing in no less than six movies
including the summer blockbuster The Patriot
Logue was soon being touted as one of the industry's more promising -- to say nothing of hard-working -- talents. Matt Long (Actor) Born: May 18
United States Trivia: Performer Matt Long emerged as a supporting actor in the mid- to late 2000s. He achieved his most significant break in his early twenties
as one of the titular leads on Thomas Schlamme's critically worshipped -- but audience-ignored -- coming-of-age series drama
despite its title and one of the plot elements
bore only the most tenuous connection to the Kennedy family -- observed the doings of two contemporary young brothers
amid the throes of an upbringing by their hip
and the overarching suggestion that one would go on to run for president in the 2040s. After it folded prematurely at the end of its first season

Long tackled supporting roles in such features as the romantic comedy Sydney White (playing the boyfriend of Amanda Bynes) and the Nicolas Cage superhero saga Ghost Rider (as a young Cage). He appeared in Homecoming
and was cast in the 2010 TV series The Deep End. Raquel Alessi (Actor) Born: March 07
